languages.text: "Зачем ты сражаешься? Я не угрожаю ни тебе, Иждриг, ни твоим людям".
"Why do you fight? I pose no threat to you, Izdrig, nor to your people."
languages.original_text: "Зачем ты сражаешься? Я не угрожаю ни тебе, Иждриг, ни твоим людям".

traits.locale_text: "Why do you fight? I pose no threat to you, Izdrig, nor to your people."
"Why do you fight? I pose no threat to you, Izdrig, nor to your people."
"This situation we find ourselves in is ridiculous. I am not a threat to you or your people, Izdrig."
"Why do you fight? I pose no threat to you, Izdrig, nor to your people."
"Why do you fight? I pose no threat to you, Izdrig, nor to your people."
"Why do you fight? I pose no threat to you, Izdrig, nor to your people."

languages.text: 「我々が置かれたこの状況はばかげている。イズドリグ、私はあなたにもあなたの民にも脅威ではない」
languages.original_text: "This situation we find ourselves in is ridiculous. I am not a threat to you or your people, Izdrig."

traits.locale_text: 「我々が置かれたこの状況はばかげている。イズドリグ、私はあなたにもあなたの民にも脅威ではない。」

languages.text: « Pourquoi se battre ? Je ne suis une menace ni pour vous ni pour votre peuple, Izdrig. »
languages.original_text: "Why do you fight? I pose no threat to you, Izdrig, nor to your people."

traits.locale_text: « Pourquoi se battre ? Je ne suis une menace ni pour vous ni pour votre peuple, Izdrig. »

languages.text: "Neden savaşıyorsun? Ne sana ne de halkına tehdit oluşturmuyorum İzdrig."
languages.original_text: "Why do you fight? I pose no threat to you, Izdrig, nor to your people."

traits.locale_text: "Neden savaşıyorsun? Ne sana ne de halkına tehdit oluşturmuyorum İzdrig."

languages.text: "Warum kämpft Ihr? Ich bin weder für Euch, noch für Eure Leute eine Gefahr, Izdrig."
languages.original_text: "Why do you fight? I pose no threat to you, Izdrig, nor to your people."

traits.locale_text: "Warum kämpft Ihr? Ich bin weder für Euch, noch für Eure Leute eine Gefahr, Izdrig."

languages.text: «¿Por qué luchar? No soy ninguna amenaza para usted ni para su gente, Izdrig».
languages.original_text: "Why do you fight? I pose no threat to you, Izdrig, nor to your people."

traits.locale_text: «¿Por qué luchar? No soy ninguna amenaza para usted ni para su gente, Izdrig».

languages.text: “你为什么要跟我交手？伊兹德里格，我对你以及你的子民都不构成威胁。”
languages.original_text: "Why do you fight? I pose no threat to you, Izdrig, nor to your people."

traits.locale_text: “你为什么要跟我交手？伊兹德里格，我对你以及你的子民都不构成威胁。”
